headline: UCLA seeks upset bid against dominant LSU in Death Valley
subhead: The seventh-ranked Bruins travel to Baton Rouge looking to derail the third-ranked Tigers' playoff momentum.

xFactor.why: UCLA's defense must generate consistent pressure and contain LSU's explosive passing game to keep this within reach late.

keyMatchup: UCLA's secondary coverage schemes against LSU's receivers in space will determine whether the Bruins can force the Tigers into uncomfortable third-down situations.
body: LSU demolished Clemson last week with a balanced offensive attack that showcased the kind of dominance a playoff contender needs to display. The Tigers' defensive pressure was suffocating, and their ability to control the line of scrimmage on both sides separated them from a ranked opponent. UCLA, meanwhile, dropped a winnable game to Arkansas in a contest that exposed some inconsistency in execution down the stretch.

The Bruins arrive in Death Valley as road underdogs for good reason, but UCLA's recent tournament pedigree means they understand the magnitude of hostile environments. If the Bruins can establish their ground game early and avoid negative plays, they'll have a genuine shot to steal this one. LSU's depth and talent suggest they should prevail, but UCLA's ranking and resilience ensure this won't be a coronation.
